channel.title: MATH-101 Discrete Math: Logic and Sets :: CS Two Year Refactor
channel.description: MATH-101 — Discrete Math: Logic and Sets 1 credit (co-designed external) Working description (External/co-designed. Pairs with Boolean logic/representation in CS-103.) To develop Learning outcomes / competencies evidenced Week-by-week map (8 weeks) Signature/embedded assessments Threads passing through (with pass depth) Prerequisites and standalone-extractability (for service use)
